title: Fantastic Fried Dutch Cheese Casserole
description: A savory Dutch dish featuring English mustard and a crispy fried crust, perfect for a lazy Sunday. This shojin-friendly casserole is sure to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, milk, and English mustard.
Add the shredded Gouda cheese to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Pour the melted butter into the bowl and stir until the mixture is smooth.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the panko breadcrumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the casserole mixture into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
Remove the fried casserole balls from the oil and place them on top of the casserole in the baking dish.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
